prompt: Create a realistic full-body lifestyle portrait of a young East Asian woman sitting on the edge of a wooden outdoor deck in front of a modern house with large dark-framed glass sliding doors. She has long dark brown hair, smooth fair skin, subtle natural makeup, small earrings, and a gentle relaxed smile while looking directly at the camera. She wears a fitted pale pink short-sleeve mini dress with a high crew neck, simple and elegant, and a delicate bracelet. Pose her seated with hands folded over one knee, legs crossed and extended forward, barefoot, with a calm graceful posture. The setting includes warm brown wooden floorboards, a wooden bench or low table to the right with a folded cream-colored bag or cloth on top, faint indoor furniture visible through the glass, and soft greenery reflected in the windows. Use natural daylight, shallow depth of field, soft background blur, realistic skin texture, balanced flattering composition, vertical portrait framing, high-resolution photography style, no text, no watermark, no exaggerated anatomy.
promptEn: Create a realistic full-body lifestyle portrait of a young East Asian woman sitting on the edge of a wooden outdoor deck in front of a modern house with large dark-framed glass sliding doors. She has long dark brown hair, smooth fair skin, subtle natural makeup, small earrings, and a gentle relaxed smile while looking directly at the camera. She wears a fitted pale pink short-sleeve mini dress with a high crew neck, simple and elegant, and a delicate bracelet. Pose her seated with hands folded over one knee, legs crossed and extended forward, barefoot, with a calm graceful posture. The setting includes warm brown wooden floorboards, a wooden bench or low table to the right with a folded cream-colored bag or cloth on top, faint indoor furniture visible through the glass, and soft greenery reflected in the windows. Use natural daylight, shallow depth of field, soft background blur, realistic skin texture, balanced flattering composition, vertical portrait framing, high-resolution photography style, no text, no watermark, no exaggerated anatomy.
promptZh: 创作一张写实的全身生活方式肖像，拍摄一位年轻的东亚女性，她坐在现代住宅外的木质露台边缘，背景是带有深色边框的大型玻璃推拉门。她拥有 一头深棕色长发，皮肤白皙细腻，妆容自然清透，佩戴小巧耳环，面带温柔放松的微笑，直视镜头。她身穿一件修身的淡粉色短袖迷你裙，圆领设计，简约优雅，并佩戴着精致的手链。姿势设定为坐姿，双手叠放在膝盖上，双腿交叉向前伸展，赤脚，姿态从容优雅。场景包括暖棕色的木质地板，右侧设有一个木凳或矮桌，上面放着一个米色的包或布料，透过玻璃可以看到隐约的室内家具，窗户上倒映着柔和的绿植。采用自然日光，浅景深，柔和的背景虚化，写实的皮肤纹理，平衡且美观的构图，竖版肖像构图，高分辨率摄影风格，无文字，无水印，无夸张的解剖结构。
